name: Devonshire Potato-Mushroom Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Spread half of the mashed potatoes in a buttered 9-inch pie plate.
3. Cook the mushrooms and onions in butter until tender. Stir in lemon juice, salt, pepper, and spoon over potato layer. Top with remaining mashed potatoes.
4. Bake for 45 minutes or until brown. Cut into wedges to serve.
